shortDescription: Bybit offers one of the most competitive crypto welcome bonus packages with up to 30,000 USDT for new users who deposit and trade.
longDescription: Bybit is a major global crypto exchange known for derivatives, spot trading, copy trading and aggressive promotional campaigns. Founded in 2018 and headquartered in Dubai, Bybit serves over 30 million users worldwide with a wide range of trading products including futures, options, and a growing spot market. Their welcome bonus for new users is among the highest in the industry, distributed across tiered tasks that reward registration, first deposit, and trading volume milestones. Bybit holds a Virtual Asset license from Dubai VARA and has expanded significantly into Web3 wallet and DeFi products.
editorNote: Top pick for serious traders. The 30K USDT ceiling is industry-leading but requires meaningful trading volume to unlock all tiers. Copy trading and Web3 wallet integration are genuinely best-in-class. Not for no-KYC users.

shortDescription: Binance is the world's largest crypto exchange by trading volume, offering a comprehensive ecosystem including spot, futures, P2P and DeFi services.
longDescription: Binance is the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and user count. Founded in 2017 by Changpeng Zhao, it has grown to serve over 320 million registered users across more than 100 countries. Binance offers an expansive product suite including spot trading, futures, options, P2P marketplace, Launchpad, DeFi integrations, NFTs and its own blockchain (BNB Chain). Despite regulatory challenges in multiple jurisdictions including the U.S. and UK, Binance remains the dominant global crypto trading venue by volume.
editorNote: #1 by trading volume and user count with 320M+ users (320,868,780 shown on the registration page we captured in June 2026). The 19,800 USDT bonus package is one of the largest available and the ecosystem is unmatched in depth. KYC is required and U.S./UK users cannot access Binance.com - for everyone else, this is the benchmark.

pros: Most trusted and regulated crypto exchange globally
Publicly listed on NASDAQ (COIN) — transparent financials
Available in US, EU, UK — ideal for regulated-market users

FDIC-insured USD balances up to $250,000

requirements: New users must sign up via referral link, complete full KYC verification, and buy or sell $100 or more in any cryptocurrency to receive the $10 BTC reward.
riskNotes: Coinbase is a publicly listed, regulated exchange. Crypto assets are not protected by government deposit insurance. $10 bonus is paid in Bitcoin and subject to official terms.
shortDescription: Coinbase is the most trusted and regulated crypto exchange in the US and EU, publicly listed on NASDAQ. Best for beginners in developed markets seeking a fully licensed, user-friendly platform.
longDescription: Coinbase, founded in 2012, is the largest and most regulated cryptocurrency exchange in the United States, listed on NASDAQ since 2021. It serves over 100 million verified users across the US, UK, EU, Canada and Australia. Coinbase holds licenses from FinCEN, the FCA (UK), MiCA-compliant EU regulators, and multiple US state money transmitter licences. Unlike most competitors, Coinbase undergoes regular public financial audits as a listed company. Its interface is intentionally simplified for first-time buyers, with a separate 'Advanced Trade' view for experienced traders. The welcome bonus is modest at $10 in Bitcoin — this reflects Coinbase's positioning: trust and compliance over promotional offers.
editorNote: Our pick for US and EU users who prioritise regulatory compliance and long-term platform trust over maximum bonus size. The $10 reward is genuinely low compared to Bybit or OKX, but Coinbase's NASDAQ listing, FCA registration and FDIC-insured USD balances make it the obvious choice for users in regulated markets who cannot or will not use offshore exchanges.
bonusNote: $10 BTC upon first qualifying trade — most reliable and straightforward bonus in the industry
geoRestrictions: Available in US, UK, EU, CA, AU. Not available in Nigeria, Indonesia, Vietnam, Philippines, Turkey.
realisticUserExpectation: $10 in BTC is received reliably upon completing first trade; no gimmicks, no volume requirements
bonusConditionSummary: Buy or sell $100+ of crypto; $10 BTC credited automatically
